positive: A whimsical, stylized jungle animal print incorporating elements of abstract geometric patterns. The main subject is a sophisticated, minimalist Bengal tiger profile, rendered in deep emerald green and sapphire blue linework. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, framed by stylized tropical foliage (monstera leaves, exotic ferns) rendered in stark black silhouette. The overall aesthetic is Art Nouveau meets modern graphic design, suitable for textile printing. Use strong contrast, clean outlines, and flat, matte color blocking with no gradients. High resolution, graphic design art, pop art style, centered composition, vector illustration feel, suitable for T-shirt or apparel print.
negative: low detail, blurry, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, watermark, out of frame, messy, grunge, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, grain, realistic, photo, photograph, gradient
